claims: AC1: project-root path resolution returns repo-local absolute paths and rejects escape attempts
AC2: atomic file writes succeed inside the repo root and reject outside-root targets

execution_steps.summary: Added an explicit US-00 bootstrap story to .claude/ralph-desk/plans/prd-node-rewrite.md and aligned the verifier-facing scope with AC1/AC2.
GREEN: AC1 happy, boundary, and negative tests passed (3/3).
RED before the harness fix: the AC2 boundary test failed under the filtered run because shared scratch paths were not isolated across test processes.
Updated tests/node/us00-bootstrap.test.mjs to use per-test, per-process scratch directories and corrected verifier-facing test-spec commands/placeholders for US-00.
GREEN: AC2 happy, boundary, and negative tests passed (3/3).
Build smoke passed: both US-00 shared modules import successfully.
Committed substantive US-00 verifier-repair changes in 1918b5c.
